title: Reliable
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Reliable''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that was a part of the blockade of [[ThonBoka]]. It was the fourth cruiser [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] visited as a traveling salesman and [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player. While playing sabacc with a pair of gunners and the cooks [[Clive]] and [[Merle]], he was pointed on to the ''[[Courteous]]'', which was the blockade ship nearest the mouth of the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
